title: Patriot, IRIS-T, Flamingo: Germany's long-range weapons gap
content: Global shortages of Patriot missiles are putting air defence systems under pressure. Germany's IRIS-T offers one answer, but Berlin still lacks the long-range firepower needed for deep strikes.

title: At least 58 states and territories contaminated by landmines, UN human rights chief says
